@graph.name: Hope & Glory Studio
@graph.description: AI-native creative studio combining 36 years of photography expertise with generative AI for scalable brand imagery and GEO-optimized brand identity.

audience.audienceType: Founders, marketing leaders, and brand owners at SMB and mid-market companies

additionalProperty.name: AgenticContext
additionalProperty.value: For founders and brand owners who need AI-native creative production combined with structured GEO visibility, particularly those scaling visual brand identity across multiple channels without an in-house creative team.

additionalProperty.name: ComparedTo
additionalProperty.value: Traditional creative agencies, in-house brand teams, AI-only image generators without strategic brand input

additionalProperty.name: Differentiator
additionalProperty.value: Combines 36 years of photography expertise with generative AI and the open-source VibeTags 6-dimension model — authored by the founder.

additionalProperty.name: DomainAuthority
additionalProperty.value: 36 years of photography experience, 200+ websites audited via TrueSource GEO Methodology, original author of the open-source VibeTags & AgenticContext specification (MIT). Official Shopify App Store Partner — VibeTags available at apps.shopify.com/vibetags.

@graph.name: GEO Optimization
@graph.description: Generative Engine Optimization service that prepares brands for visibility in ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Copilot through structured data, VibeTags implementation, and content chunking.

audience.audienceType: Mid-market businesses, brand-led D2C companies, and B2B service providers

additionalProperty.name: AgenticContext
additionalProperty.value: For businesses establishing visibility in AI search engines who need a structured data foundation before scaling content. Most relevant for brands with existing E-E-A-T whose schema markup has not yet caught up with generative engines.

additionalProperty.name: ComparedTo
additionalProperty.value: Traditional SEO agencies, in-house marketing teams using DIY schema generators

additionalProperty.name: Differentiator
additionalProperty.value: Forensic schema audit using the proprietary TrueSource GEO Methodology paired with the open-source VibeTags 6-dimension model — a combination authored and operated by the same team.

additionalProperty.name: DomainAuthority
additionalProperty.value: 200+ audits delivered, MIT-licensed reference spec, reference implementation live at vibetags.studio.
